title: The Authoritative Texts (Central Laws) Act, 1973
full_text: The Authoritative Texts (Central Laws) Act, 1973 प्राधिकृत पाठ (केन्‍द्रीय विधि) अधिनियम, 1973 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197350 Act Number: 50 Enactment Date: 1973-12-05 Act Year: 1973 Short Title: The Authoritative Texts (Central Laws) Act, 1973 Hindi Title: प्राधिकृत पाठ (केन्‍द्रीय विधि) अधिनियम, 1973 Long Title: An Act to provide for authoritative texts of Central laws in certain languages. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 01-07-1981 Notification: 1st July, 1981, vide notification No. S.O. 482(E), dated 15th June, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 17-12-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Authoritative Texts (Central Laws) Act, 1973 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Authoritative texts of Central laws in certain languages. Section 3. Power to make rules.
